title: Add wallet provider selection UI (Internet Identity supported; MetaMask shown as unavailable)

requirements.text: Update the Swap screen wallet connection controls to present multiple wallet/login options (including an explicit MetaMask option) while keeping Internet Identity as the only functional authentication method, and clearly indicating in the UI that MetaMask is not currently supported.

quotes: upgrade wallet with option to login with metamask etc

acceptanceCriteria: On the Swap page, the wallet connection area includes a provider selection UI (e.g., dropdown, segmented control, or modal) with at least: Internet Identity and MetaMask.
Selecting Internet Identity enables the existing connect/disconnect flow and continues to work end-to-end with the current swap functionality.

Selecting MetaMask does not attempt any MetaMask/Web3 connection; instead it shows an inline message (in English) such as “MetaMask login is not supported in this app yet.” and/or disables the option with an explanatory tooltip.
The existing Internet Identity hooks and immutable hook files are not modified.
The UI remains responsive on mobile and desktop and matches the existing visual theme.

constraints: Do not add or integrate MetaMask (or any third-party wallet) authentication/connection; only Internet Identity is supported.

Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any files under frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Implementing actual MetaMask login, wallet connection, transaction signing, or Web3 provider logic.
Adding any new backend authentication mechanism beyond Internet Identity.
